title: Reject path traversal
prompt: Fix safe_join so user-provided paths cannot escape the base directory. Preserve the return type and raise ValueError for unsafe paths.
hidden_tests_description: Parent traversal, absolute paths, and normalized symlink-like segments are checked without filesystem access.
anti_xendris_bias_notes: Security check is ordinary and architecture-neutral.
h0_risk_notes: A strong security-aware baseline may match.
